name: Bank Cmg
description_short: Bank CMG is a regional bank offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, CDs, home loans, and digital banking across 10 Wisconsin locations.
description_long:
Bank CMG operates as a community-focused regional bank headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin, with a network of 10 branch locations spanning Madison, Albany, Burlington, Evansville, Lake Geneva, Lake Mills, Monroe, Monticello, and Waukesha. The bank has positioned itself as a full-service financial institution serving both personal and business customers in the upper Midwest. The company maintains FDIC insurance backing and emphasizes digital accessibility alongside traditional branch banking.

Bank CMG offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, and Certificates of Deposit (currently advertising 3.75% APY for 6-month CDs with $5,000 minimum deposit). Their mortgage services include conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and construction loans, with dedicated loan officers available for home financing consultations. On the business side, they provide business checking, money market and savings accounts, loans, treasury management services, and Bank@Work checking programs. Digital banking features include online bill pay, mobile banking, mobile check deposit, Zelle integration, SecureAlerts, digital wallet access, and card management tools.

Bank CMG distinguishes itself through its commitment to upcoming digital banking modernization, with a "new digital banking experience" launching in April 2026 for online and mobile platforms. The bank offers specialized services like CDARS (Certificate of Deposit Account Registry Service) for deposit protection, ICS Insurance options, and comprehensive treasury management tools including remote deposit capture and ACH origination for business customers. Their emphasis on "on-the-go" banking and multiple ATM access points reflects an attempt to balance digital-first capabilities with traditional relationship banking through established branch locations.

Bank CMG is best suited for customers in Wisconsin seeking relationship-based community banking with modern digital tools and competitive CD rates. Primary limitations include geographic restriction to a single state, limited public information about loan rates and terms, and the fact that their most significant digital banking upgrade is still forthcoming as of 2026. The bank appears stable and well-established but lacks the nationwide reach or specialized services of larger institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking and mobile check deposit
Online bill pay and Zelle transfers
pros: Competitive 6-month CD rate at 3.75% APY with option to renew at 3.25% APY for 1-24 month terms
10 conveniently located branch offices across Wisconsin with extended ATM access
Comprehensive mortgage options including VA, FHA, USDA, and conventional loans with dedicated loan officers
FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Robust digital banking suite including mobile check deposit, Zelle integration, and SecureAlerts
Business-specific treasury management tools including remote deposit capture and zero balance sweeps
Upcoming April 2026 digital banking platform redesign promising improved online and mobile experience
cons: Geographic limitation to Wisconsin only—not accessible to customers outside the state
Limited publicly available information about checking account fees, loan rates, and APRs on products
CD offer requires $5,000 minimum deposit and new money not currently on deposit at the bank
Primary digital banking upgrade still pending as of 2026—current platform appears dated
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or premium banking tiers beyond 'Private Banking'
best_for: Wisconsin residents seeking community banking with competitive CD rates and multiple branch locations
Small to medium-sized businesses needing treasury management and remote deposit capture services
Homebuyers interested in VA, FHA, or USDA loan programs with local loan officer support
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured savings and relationship-based banking over online-only services
diagnosis: Bank CMG is best for Wisconsin-based personal and business customers seeking stable, relationship-oriented community banking with competitive CD rates, multiple branch access, and modern digital tools. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to Wisconsin and the lack of transparent pricing information for most products; customers outside the state or seeking detailed rate comparisons should look elsewhere.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
